mapper.sql: id, job_id, job_name, target_job_id, target_job_name, path_steps, total_steps, estimated_total_months, confidence_score, path_type, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_career_plan.job_vertical_paths WHERE job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY confidence_score DESC
SELECT FROM ai_career_plan.job_vertical_paths ORDER BY job_id, confidence_score DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_career_plan.job_vertical_paths WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
SELECT FROM ai_career_plan.job_vertical_paths ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1
